title: Shinjis dream sex
wikitext:
[]: Shinji's dream sex Post by Halicat » Tue Feb 23, 2010 5:07 pm Woo first thread Searched for this thread and wasn't able to find anything so do forgive me if anything similar to this has popped up but what I want to know is, during Shinji's 'dream sex' sequence in Ep.20 Asuka, Rei and Misato all got their own lines in the dub ["It'd be very, very nice." "It could be very...pleasant." "It'd be reeeallly awesome!"] now...what if Kaworu was in there too? [Supposing Shinji had met him at this point and of course, was attracted to him.] What would you think he'd say? Serious answers are appreciated but silly ones are ok too, even if you don't like K/S I'm just interested! I'm sure everyone can join in with this :)

[]: Post by Synapsid » Tue Feb 23, 2010 5:15 pm "Songs are nice..." Probably something Anno and Aiko would come up with, I wonder what could fit into that scene best he might not need to say much, if anything to get Shinji's aproval.

[]: Post by VoidEater » Tue Feb 23, 2010 5:20 pm "It's the same, only different"

[]: Post by NemZ » Tue Feb 23, 2010 5:38 pm probably something cheesy about 'making music together' or some such.

[]: Post by Grimmjow » Tue Feb 23, 2010 10:35 pm Kaworu wasn't even in Shinji's sexual fantasies during HI in EoE.

[]: Post by Synapsid » Tue Feb 23, 2010 11:40 pm Grimmjow wrote: Kaworu wasn't even in Shinji's sexual fantasies during HI in EoE.

[]: Post by Sachi » Wed Feb 24, 2010 12:02 am Synapsid wrote: Grimmjow wrote: Kaworu wasn't even in Shinji's sexual fantasies during HI in EoE.

[]: Post by Synapsid » Wed Feb 24, 2010 12:32 am Certainly, but we've seen Shinji link the two, particularly in that film. Besides is there really any reason why the implications around Kaworu appearing as a guide before Shinji should be any different from the ones carried by Ritsuko appearing as Maya's guide Or Misato as Hyuga's for that mater? Physical desire did seem to play a part in what people wanted, "What is it you wish for" .

[]: Post by Halicat » Wed Feb 24, 2010 5:10 am Grimmjow wrote: Kaworu wasn't even in Shinji's sexual fantasies during HI in EoE.

[]: Post by Ornette » Wed Feb 24, 2010 6:22 am Besides is there really any reason why the implications around Kaworu appearing as a guide

[]: Post by Dirty Mick » Wed Feb 24, 2010 6:33 am I wonder what Yui thought when Kaworu poped up like that. I bet that was akward for her.

[]: Post by Xard » Wed Feb 24, 2010 6:37 am Synapsid wrote: Certainly, but we've seen Shinji link the two, particularly in that film. Besides is there really any reason why the implications around Kaworu appearing as a guide before Shinji should be any different from the ones carried by Ritsuko appearing as Maya's guide Or Misato as Hyuga's for that mater? Physical desire did seem to play a part in what people wanted, "What is it you wish for" .

[]: Re: Shinji's dream sex Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Wed Feb 24, 2010 11:33 am the main problem here is shin didn't even know kaworu in episode 20. also, condisering hiis role in the final dream sequence in EoE (his only appearance in any dream sequence from evangelion) he wouldn't be part of the dream sex, he would probably be there to give him re-assurance. mental orgies were not tabris's thing. sorry to piss on your parade. but if you would desire, we can converse about the signifigance of Shinji's dream sex as a whole, and stop discussing stuff that never did or never could happen. (and i mean only be the cannon timeline.) but congradualtions on your first thread newbie, the title was an eyecatcher, and thats half the battle, keep up the good work. @grimjow: again, your the voice of reason in a sea of chaos.

[]: Post by VoidEater » Wed Feb 24, 2010 11:54 am What, did everyone miss the "what if" in the OP? This is Chit-Chat, after all...

[]: Post by jim_loves_randy » Wed Feb 24, 2010 2:35 pm That's really easy, Shinji would be bottom each and every time.

[]: Post by Hekatos » Wed Feb 24, 2010 2:50 pm I don't even want to imagine something like that to happen. Here's what would happen in my mind: Shinji: "What are you doing in here?" Kaworu: "..." Shinji creates a gun in his mind and shoots him in the head. I dance happily over Kaworu's dead body ^^

[]: Post by NemZ » Wed Feb 24, 2010 2:59 pm What does Shinji want? Either Kaworu and boobs or a Kaworu with boobs. Shinjiquarium shot implies the former, though.

[]: Post by Synapsid » Wed Feb 24, 2010 3:09 pm Xard wrote: Kaworu NEVER was Shinji's transition guide...

[]: Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Wed Feb 24, 2010 3:49 pm jim_loves_randy wrote: That's really easy, Shinji would be bottom each and every time.

[]: Post by Xard » Wed Feb 24, 2010 3:57 pm Synapsid wrote: Xard wrote: Kaworu NEVER was Shinji's transition guide...
